option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<BorderPane xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.AuthLandingController" stylesheets="@../styles/auth.css" styleClass="auth-root"> <top> <HBox spacing="12" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="auth-topbar"> <padding> <Insets top="14" right="18" bottom="14" left="18"/> </padding> <Label text="Artium" styleClass="auth-brand-mini"/> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Button text="Accueil" styleClass="auth-topbar-link"/> <Button text="Se connecter" onAction="#onLoginClick" styleClass="auth-topbar-ghost"/> <Button text="Aide" onAction="#onHelpClick" styleClass="auth-topbar-link"/> <Button text="Créer un compte" onAction="#onCreateAccount" styleClass="auth-topbar-primary"/> </HBox> </top>
<center> <StackPane styleClass="auth-landing-shell"> <HBox spacing="0" alignment="CENTER" maxWidth="1100" styleClass="auth-landing-card"> <VBox spacing="18" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="auth-landing-hero" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <padding> <Insets top="44" right="44" bottom="44" left="44"/> </padding> <Label text="Artium" styleClass="auth-brand"/> <Label text="Découvrez le monde créatif" wrapText="true" styleClass="auth-hero-title"/> <Label text="Rejoignez une expérience desktop plus claire, plus fluide et plus élégante pour l'inscription." wrapText="true" styleClass="auth-hero-text"/> <HBox spacing="10" styleClass="auth-chip-row"> <Label text="Rapide" styleClass="auth-chip"/> <Label text="Sécurisé" styleClass="auth-chip"/> <Label text="Moderne" styleClass="auth-chip"/> </HBox> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="16" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="auth-landing-panel" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <padding> <Insets top="44" right="44" bottom="44" left="44"/> </padding> <Label text="Bienvenue" styleClass="auth-panel-kicker"/> <Label text="Commencez votre inscription" wrapText="true" styleClass="auth-panel-title"/> <Label text="Choisissez le parcours adapté à votre application desktop et accédez à une interface plus présentable." wrapText="true" styleClass="auth-panel-text"/> <VBox spacing="12" styleClass="auth-landing-actions"> <Button text="Créer mon compte" onAction="#onCreateAccount" styleClass="auth-primary-button" maxWidth="Infinity"/> <Button text="J'ai déjà un compte" onAction="#onLoginClick" styleClass="auth-secondary-button" maxWidth="Infinity"/> </VBox> </VBox> </HBox> </StackPane> </center> </BorderPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.image.Image?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.Region?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<BorderPane xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.AuthLandingController" stylesheets="@../styles/auth.css" styleClass="auth-root"> <top> <HBox spacing="12" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="auth-topbar auth-topbar-glass"> <padding> <Insets top="14" right="18" bottom="14" left="18"/> </padding> <StackPane styleClass="auth-mini-logo-wrap"> <ImageView fitWidth="112" preserveRatio="true" smooth="true" cache="true" styleClass="auth-mini-logo"> <image> <Image url="@../images/Colored%20PNG%20White%20Logo.png"/> </image> </ImageView> </StackPane> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Button text="Accueil" styleClass="auth-topbar-link"/> <Button text="Se connecter" onAction="#onLoginClick" styleClass="auth-topbar-ghost"/> <Button text="Aide" onAction="#onHelpClick" styleClass="auth-topbar-link"/> <Button text="Créer un compte" onAction="#onCreateAccount" styleClass="auth-topbar-primary"/> </HBox> </top>
<center> <StackPane styleClass="auth-landing-shell auth-landing-shell-fluid"> <HBox spacing="0" alignment="CENTER" maxWidth="1130" styleClass="auth-landing-card auth-landing-card-fluid"> <VBox spacing="20" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="auth-landing-hero auth-landing-hero-fluid" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <padding> <Insets top="48" right="48" bottom="48" left="48"/> </padding> <StackPane styleClass="auth-hero-logo-wrap"> <ImageView fitWidth="250" preserveRatio="true" smooth="true" cache="true" styleClass="auth-hero-logo"> <image> <Image url="@../images/Colored%20PNG%20White%20Logo.png"/> </image> </ImageView> </StackPane> <Label text="Explore The World" wrapText="true" styleClass="auth-hero-title auth-landing-title"/> <Label text="Rejoignez une plateforme créative moderne avec une expérience d'inscription fluide, élégante et professionnelle." wrapText="true" styleClass="auth-hero-text auth-landing-text"/> <HBox spacing="10" styleClass="auth-chip-row"> <Label text="Rapide" styleClass="auth-chip"/> <Label text="Sécurisé" styleClass="auth-chip"/> <Label text="Moderne" styleClass="auth-chip"/> </HBox> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="16" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="auth-landing-panel auth-landing-panel-fluid" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <padding> <Insets top="48" right="44" bottom="48" left="44"/> </padding> <Label text="Bienvenue" styleClass="auth-panel-kicker"/> <Label text="Commencez votre inscription" wrapText="true" styleClass="auth-panel-title auth-landing-panel-title"/> <Label text="Créez votre profil et accédez à une interface intuitive, optimisée pour amateur, artiste ou admin." wrapText="true" styleClass="auth-panel-text auth-landing-panel-text"/> <VBox spacing="12" styleClass="auth-landing-actions"> <Button text="Créer mon compte" onAction="#onCreateAccount" styleClass="auth-primary-button" maxWidth="Infinity"/> <Button text="J'ai déjà un compte" onAction="#onLoginClick" styleClass="auth-secondary-button" maxWidth="Infinity"/> </VBox> </VBox> </HBox> </StackPane> </center> </BorderPane>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
